titles.title: It's Not Form, It's Not Fashion

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: On the day of Pentecost, there assembled quite a few, but the most important thing was soon to come. Then from heaven God did send, like the mighty rushing wind. Then they found the Holy Ghost so genuine.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It's not form, and it's not fashion. It's salvation sent from God suits me just fine. It's old yet it's new, It's powerful, yet it's true, I'm so glad this Holy Ghost is genuine.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Skeptics always standing by, what does this mean they cried. Can't see the way you Pentecostals act. Peter preached to them that day, and it hastened them to say. We want this Holy Ghost so genuine.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: If the devil has you bound, and is running you around. There's just one way that your soul can be set free. Repent and be baptized, in the Name of Jesus Christ. Then the Holy Ghost will come so genuine.
